description: Designed DHS card with a 'LIVING OUR TRUTH' header: soft pastel paper-texture background with a fan of diagonal rainbow/Progress-Pride stripes in the top-left corner overlaid with the white outlined headline 'LIVING OUR TRUTH,' and 'DHS celebrates' with multicolor 'LGBTQIA+ Pride' at top-right. Centered is a circular photo, framed by a rainbow-gradient ring, of a smiling woman in a dark Secret Service uniform kneeling on pavement beside a German Shepherd dog. Below a large blue quotation mark, the block quote reads: "I respect other people's differing beliefs and religions, but equality and the freedom to love who we love are fundamental rights of humanity that should be respected as well. Many people who came before us fought hard so that we could celebrate the month of pride." Bottom-left has a small vertical rainbow bar and the text: 'Evelyn A. / USSS, Officer - Technician of the Canine Unit / with DHS for 17 Years.' The rainbow-accented circular DHS seal is at bottom-right.
notable_text: LIVING OUR TRUTH; DHS celebrates LGBTQIA+ Pride; "I respect other people's differing beliefs and religions, but equality and the freedom to love who we love are fundamental rights of humanity..."; Evelyn A., USSS, Officer - Technician of the Canine Unit, with DHS for 17 Years
